emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Clayton Hotel Sligo website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 67/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL redirect
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 10 external scripts
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No meta description
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing alt text on 5 images
 HIGH
--------------------
- No contact form


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: Visitors reaching HTTP are not redirected to HTTPS, risking security warnings.
issues.label: No SSL redirect
issues.check: Type http://[domain] - does it automatically go to https://?
issues.siteHint: Google flags non-HTTPS sites as 'Not Secure' in Chrome.

issues.label: 10 external scripts
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Search results show a generic snippet instead of a compelling description.
issues.label: No meta description
issues.check: Search 'site:[business URL]' on Google. Does the snippet look well-written?
issues.siteHint: Meta descriptions directly impact click-through rates from Google by 5-15%.

issues.label: Missing alt text on 5 images
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Without a contact form, visitors must compose their own email - some won't bother.
issues.label: No contact form
issues.check: Scroll the page. Do you see a Name/Email/Message form? If only an email link, there's no form.
issues.siteHint: Contact forms typically boost inbound leads by 30-50%.
